symptom_vector: Pod crash, pod terminated unexpectedly, container exit, pod failure

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [tidb-tikv-0, tidb-tikv] experienced [qps, grpc_qps, region_pending, io_util, tidb-tikv] fault.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [tidb-tikv-0, tidb-tikv] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [failure] in Log (From GT key_observations: log keyword 'failure')
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [unavailable] in Log (From GT key_observations: log keyword 'unavailable')
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [productcatalogservice] in Trace (From GT key_observations: trace keyword 'productcatalogservice')
Step 5: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [qps, grpc_qps, region_pending, io_util, tidb-tikv] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries containing 'failure' keyword appear in system logs during fault period
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'failure' in all logs during 2025-06-19T22:10:08Z to 2025-06-19T22:22:08Z

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries containing 'unavailable' keyword appear with high frequency, especially 'Region is unavailable' errors
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'unavailable' in logs, particularly in productcatalogservice logs where 'Error 9005 (HY000): Region is unavailable' appears 120 times

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Trace data shows productcatalogservice calls experience extreme latency anomalies (4000x increase) and request proportion anomalies
critical_checks.instruction: Analyze trace data for productcatalogservice operations, check for latency spikes from 9681.24ms to 39880928.62ms and status code 2 errors with 'Region is unavailable' message

critical_checks.expected_pattern: GRPC queries per second metric shows abnormal patterns during fault period
critical_checks.instruction: Check grpc_qps metrics for tidb-tikv component during fault window

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Queries per second metric shows degradation or abnormal patterns
critical_checks.instruction: Check qps metrics for database-related services during fault period

critical_checks.expected_pattern: IO utilization metric shows abnormal patterns indicating storage performance issues
critical_checks.instruction: Check io_util metrics for storage components during fault period

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Region pending metric shows abnormal values indicating database region unavailability
critical_checks.instruction: Check region_pending metrics for TiDB components during fault period

critical_checks.expected_pattern: CPU usage metric shows abnormal patterns during fault period
critical_checks.instruction: Check cpu_usage metrics for tidb-tikv and related components

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Memory usage metric shows abnormal patterns, potentially indicating resource exhaustion
critical_checks.instruction: Check memory_usage metrics, particularly for tidb-tidb which shows 22.28% decrease from 601MB to 481MB
